summary: Bhartendra sits down with Debashish, Founder & Managing Partner of Infinite Circle Asset Manager, to unpack what is really going on in the world — from the hidden 20x-GDP derivatives market that quietly underwrites global finance, to why Trump's tariff drama is actually a debt-reduction strategy, to why Indian valuations have to compress before the next real leg up.

chapters.label: Introduction & highlight
Where is the world right now in geopolitics & investing
The hidden debt: derivatives markets at 20x GDP
Financial repression — how governments inflate away debt
Why you can't grow an old economy the old way
Disrupting supply chains to manufacture inflation
Iran, Venezuela, Greenland — the reserve-resource play
Why Trump wants you to invest in his real economy, not his bonds
The Magnificent 7: a buyer who HAS to buy
Competing with China, which is willing to build at a loss
US & AI: the same playbook as China & industry
The transition from unipolar to multipolar world
What all of this means for India
Indian valuations why Debashish stopped managing money in 2024
The PE exit machine: IPOs as distribution, not creation
The 4x jump in shareholder counts: the signal everyone missed
The March 2023 debt tax change that rewired everything
Bond yield inversion = equity PE — and what it really says
Why P/E compression can frustrate investors for years
India's real capex challenge — and why ROE will fall
Why India's PE was historically higher than Asia
India's bond market must 4–5x for real capex to happen
Should you allocate globally now?
Why China, Korea, Taiwan suddenly became attractive again
The AI hardware boom and Korea/Taiwan's win
Rupee-adjusted returns — the Nifty story no one tells you
Final advice: How retail investors should think for 5–15 years
The 20-20-20-20-20 asset allocation framework
"You can never be too bullish or too bearish on India" — Uday Kotak

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: Markets move, your plan should not. See the equity, debt and gold split that holds through the noise.

guestDisclosure: Guest bio: Debashish is the Founder and Managing Partner of Infinite Circle Asset Manager. He has over 26 years of experience investing across India, the US, and Europe, and currently manages an AIF Category III fund focused on India while also advising global FPIs. ⚠️ Disclaimer
disclaimer: This podcast is for educational and informational purposes only. Nothing discussed here constitutes financial, investment, or legal advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Please consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before making any financial decisions.

seo.title: Indian Markets Are Stuck. Here's What Nobody Is Telling You. | Debashish Bose
